
## Quick Edits

### Change Character Appearance (All Pages)
Edit: `scripts/character-descriptions.js`
```javascript
kai: `Kai is a 1-year-old toddler with:
- [CHANGE HERE] Asian ethnicity with medium-warm skin tone
- [CHANGE HERE] Very short dark brown/black hair
- ...`
```
Then regenerate: `npm run generate-images`

### Change Single Page
Edit: `scripts/improved-page-prompts.js`
```javascript
3: {
    characters: ['kai'],
    textPlacement: 'top',
    prompt: `PAGE 3 - ...
    [CHANGE SCENE DESCRIPTION HERE]`
}
```
Then regenerate: `npm run generate-images`

### Update Style Guide
Edit: `children-board-book-style-guide.md`
(Changes apply to future generations)

```bash

ls images/people/
ls images/storyline/

# If missing, see: REFERENCE_IMAGES_SETUP.md
```

2. Make descriptions more specific
3. Add more reference photos
4. Regenerate

### No Text Space
1. Edit page prompt in `scripts/improved-page-prompts.js`
2. Increase text space requirement (e.g., "TOP 30%" → "TOP 40%")
3. Regenerate specific page

### Images Not Square
- Should be fixed automatically
- Check Gemini API response in console
- Verify output dimensions: `file books/kais-first-birthday-book/pages/page-01.png`

| `images/storyline/` | Reference photos | Add scene photos |

**User**

Before generating the images again, there are a lot of issues with the web application itself, so I need you to fix those first. I have attached a screenshot of the book page.

1. The back button in the top left does not work (it should go back to the book library page.

2. It should only show 1 page at a time (if front cover page or back cover page) or 2 pages at a time (all other pages), not every page all at once vertically stacked like it is now.

3. Left arrow does not work or do anything when selected. It should not be shown when the front cover page is shown (because first page), but it should show for all other pages and flip to the previous page (if first page) or pages (left and right) when selected.

4. Right arrow does not work or do anything when selected. It should not be shown when the back cover page is shown (because last page), but it should show for all other pages and flip to the next page (if last page) or pages (left and right) when selected.

5. Export PDF does not work or do anything when selected.

6. All pages should be square with rounded corners in the top left right and bottom left (if last page or left page) or top right and bottom right (if first page or right page). These pages are portrait mode with no rounded corners. The generated images will be perfectly square, so the rounding needs to take place using code afteer the images for each page is generated.

7. Since left and right arrows do not work, I am unable to test page flip animation, but make sure that works.

---

**Cursor**

I'll fix all the issues with the book viewer. Let me first examine the current implementation and then make the necessary changes.

I can see the issues. The Turn.js library isn't properly initialized and the pages are showing stacked. Let me completely rewrite the book viewer to fix all 7 issues:

```javascript
// Book viewer functionality with Turn.js
let currentBook = null;
let bookInstance = null;
let currentPageIndex = 0; // 0-based index for tracking

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    // Get book ID from URL
    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const bookId = urlParams.get('book') || 'kais-first-birthday-book';
    
    // Find book in library
    currentBook = bookLibrary.find(b => b.id === bookId);
    
    if (!currentBook) {
        console.error('Book not found');
        return;
    }
    
    // Set book title
    document.getElementById('bookTitle').textContent = currentBook.title;
    document.getElementById('totalPages').textContent = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    // Set up event listeners first
    setupEventListeners();
    
    // Initialize book after a short delay to ensure DOM is ready
    setTimeout(() => {
        initializeBook();
    }, 100);
});

function initializeBook() {
    const bookElement = document.getElementById('book');
    bookElement.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Create pages based on book data
    currentBook.pages.forEach((page, index) => {
        const pageElement = createPageElement(page, index);
        bookElement.appendChild(pageElement);
    });
    
    // Initialize Turn.js
    bookInstance = $('#book').turn({
        width: 800,
        height: 600,
        autoCenter: true,
        pages: currentBook.pages.length,
        gradients: true,
        elevation: 50,
        when: {
            turning: function(event, page, view) {
                updatePageIndicator(page);
            }
        }
    });
    
    // Update page indicator for initial page
    updatePageIndicator(1);
    
    // Update navigation buttons
    updateNavigationButtons();
}

function createPageElement(page, index) {
    const pageDiv = document.createElement('div');
    pageDiv.className = 'page';
    
    const pageContent = document.createElement('div');
    pageContent.className = 'page-content';
    
    // Add background image
    const pageImage = document.createElement('img');
    pageImage.className = 'page-image';
    pageImage.src = page.image;
    pageImage.alt = `Page ${page.pageNumber}`;
    pageImage.onerror = function() {
        // Fallback background color if image doesn't exist
        this.style.display = 'none';
        pageContent.style.backgroundColor = page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff';
    };
    
    // Add text overlay
    const textDiv = document.createElement('div');
    textDiv.className = `page-text ${page.text.color === 'white' ? 'white-text' : ''}`;
    
    page.text.lines.forEach(line => {
        const lineElement = document.createElement('p');
        lineElement.className = `${line.size}-text`;
        lineElement.style.fontWeight = line.weight || 'normal';
        if (line.weight === 'bold') {
            lineElement.style.textTransform = 'uppercase';
        }
        lineElement.textContent = line.text;
        textDiv.appendChild(lineElement);
    });
    
    pageContent.appendChild(pageImage);
    pageContent.appendChild(textDiv);
    pageDiv.appendChild(pageContent);
    
    return pageDiv;
}

function setupEventListeners() {
    // Back button
    document.getElementById('backButton').addEventListener('click', () => {
        window.location.href = 'index.html';
    });
    
    // Previous page button
    document.getElementById('prevPage').addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (bookInstance) {
            bookInstance.turn('previous');
        }
    });
    
    // Next page button
    document.getElementById('nextPage').addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (bookInstance) {
            bookInstance.turn('next');
        }
    });
    
    // Keyboard navigation
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
            if (bookInstance) {
                bookInstance.turn('previous');
            }
        } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
            if (bookInstance) {
                bookInstance.turn('next');
            }
        }
    });
    
    // PDF export button
    document.getElementById('exportPdfButton').addEventListener('click', () => {
        exportToPDF();
    });
    
    // Update navigation buttons when page changes
    $('#book').bind('turning', function(event, page, view) {
        updateNavigationButtons();
    });
}

function updatePageIndicator(page) {
    document.getElementById('currentPage').textContent = page;
}

function updateNavigationButtons() {
    if (!bookInstance) return;
    
    const currentPage = bookInstance.turn('page');
    const totalPages = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    document.getElementById('prevPage').disabled = currentPage === 1;
    document.getElementById('nextPage').disabled = currentPage === totalPages;
}

function exportToPDF() {
    if (!currentBook) return;
    
    // Show loading state
    const exportButton = document.getElementById('exportPdfButton');
    const originalText = exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent;
    exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent = 'Generating PDF...';
    exportButton.disabled = true;
    
    // Create PDF with two-page spreads
    const { jsPDF } = window.jspdf;
    const pdf = new jsPDF({
        orientation: 'landscape',
        unit: 'mm',
        format: [297, 210] // A4 landscape (approximate board book size)
    });
    
    let pageIndex = 0;
    const totalPages = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    // Function to add pages to PDF
    function addPageToPDF(index) {
        if (index >= totalPages) {
            // All pages processed, save PDF
            pdf.save(`${currentBook.title.replace(/\s+/g, '-')}.pdf`);
            exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent = originalText;
            exportButton.disabled = false;
            return;
        }
        
        const page = currentBook.pages[index];
        const pageElement = document.querySelector(`#book .page:nth-child(${index + 1})`);
        
        if (!pageElement) {
            addPageToPDF(index + 1);
            return;
        }
        
        // Determine if this is a single page or part of a spread
        const isCover = page.type === 'cover' || page.type === 'back-cover';
        const isSpreadLeft = page.type === 'spread-left';
        const isSpreadRight = page.type === 'spread-right';
        
        if (isCover || (!isSpreadLeft && !isSpreadRight && index === totalPages - 1)) {
            // Single page (cover or back cover)
            html2canvas(pageElement, {
                backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                scale: 2,
                useCORS: true
            }).then(canvas => {
                const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                pdf.addPage();
                pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                addPageToPDF(index + 1);
            });
        } else if (isSpreadLeft) {
            // Two-page spread - combine left and right pages
            const rightPageIndex = index + 1;
            const rightPage = currentBook.pages[rightPageIndex];
            const rightPageElement = document.querySelector(`#book .page:nth-child(${rightPageIndex + 1})`);
            
            if (rightPageElement) {
                // Create a container for the spread
                const spreadContainer = document.createElement('div');
                spreadContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                spreadContainer.style.width = '1600px';
                spreadContainer.style.height = '600px';
                spreadContainer.style.position = 'absolute';
                spreadContainer.style.left = '-9999px';
                
                const leftClone = pageElement.cloneNode(true);
                const rightClone = rightPageElement.cloneNode(true);
                
                leftClone.style.width = '800px';
                leftClone.style.height = '600px';
                rightClone.style.width = '800px';
                rightClone.style.height = '600px';
                
                spreadContainer.appendChild(leftClone);
                spreadContainer.appendChild(rightClone);
                document.body.appendChild(spreadContainer);
                
                html2canvas(spreadContainer, {
                    backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                    scale: 2,
                    useCORS: true,
                    width: 1600,
                    height: 600
                }).then(canvas => {
                    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                    pdf.addPage();
                    pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                    document.body.removeChild(spreadContainer);
                    addPageToPDF(index + 2); // Skip right page as it's already included
                });
            } else {
                // Fallback to single page
                html2canvas(pageElement, {
                    backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                    scale: 2,
                    useCORS: true
                }).then(canvas => {
                    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                    pdf.addPage();
                    pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                    addPageToPDF(index + 1);
                });
            }
        } else if (isSpreadRight) {
            // Skip - already handled in spread-left
            addPageToPDF(index + 1);
        } else {
            // Single content page
            html2canvas(pageElement, {
                backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                scale: 2,
                useCORS: true
            }).then(canvas => {
                const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                pdf.addPage();
                pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                addPageToPDF(index + 1);
            });
        }
    }
    
    // Start processing
    addPageToPDF(0);
}


```

```javascript
// Book viewer functionality with Turn.js
let currentBook = null;
let bookInstance = null;
let currentPageIndex = 0; // 0-based index for tracking

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    // Get book ID from URL
    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const bookId = urlParams.get('book') || 'kais-first-birthday-book';
    
    // Find book in library
    currentBook = bookLibrary.find(b => b.id === bookId);
    
    if (!currentBook) {
        console.error('Book not found');
        return;
    }
    
    // Set book title
    document.getElementById('bookTitle').textContent = currentBook.title;
    document.getElementById('totalPages').textContent = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    // Set up event listeners first
    setupEventListeners();
    
    // Initialize book after a short delay to ensure DOM is ready
    setTimeout(() => {
        initializeBook();
    }, 100);
});

function initializeBook() {
    const bookElement = document.getElementById('book');
    bookElement.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Create pages based on book data
    currentBook.pages.forEach((page, index) => {
        const pageElement = createPageElement(page, index);
        bookElement.appendChild(pageElement);
    });
    
    // Initialize Turn.js with proper settings for square pages
    const pageSize = Math.min(window.innerWidth * 0.4, 500); // Square pages, max 500px
    
    bookInstance = $('#book').turn({
        width: pageSize * 2, // Double width for two-page spread
        height: pageSize,
        autoCenter: true,
        display: 'double', // Show two pages at once (except first and last)
        acceleration: true,
        gradients: true,
        elevation: 50,
        pages: currentBook.pages.length,
        when: {
            turning: function(event, page, view) {
                console.log('Turning to page:', page);
                currentPageIndex = page - 1;
                updatePageIndicator(page);
                updateNavigationButtons();
            },
            turned: function(event, page, view) {
                console.log('Turned to page:', page);
                currentPageIndex = page - 1;
                updatePageIndicator(page);
                updateNavigationButtons();
            }
        }
    });
    
    // Set initial page
    bookInstance.turn('page', 1);
    
    // Update page indicator for initial page
    updatePageIndicator(1);
    
    // Update navigation buttons
    updateNavigationButtons();
    
    console.log('Book initialized with', currentBook.pages.length, 'pages');
}

function createPageElement(page, index) {
    const pageDiv = document.createElement('div');
    pageDiv.className = 'page';
    
    const pageContent = document.createElement('div');
    pageContent.className = 'page-content';
    
    // Add background image
    const pageImage = document.createElement('img');
    pageImage.className = 'page-image';
    pageImage.src = page.image;
    pageImage.alt = `Page ${page.pageNumber}`;
    pageImage.onerror = function() {
        // Fallback background color if image doesn't exist
        this.style.display = 'none';
        pageContent.style.backgroundColor = page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff';
    };
    
    // Add text overlay
    const textDiv = document.createElement('div');
    textDiv.className = `page-text ${page.text.color === 'white' ? 'white-text' : ''}`;
    
    page.text.lines.forEach(line => {
        const lineElement = document.createElement('p');
        lineElement.className = `${line.size}-text`;
        lineElement.style.fontWeight = line.weight || 'normal';
        if (line.weight === 'bold') {
            lineElement.style.textTransform = 'uppercase';
        }
        lineElement.textContent = line.text;
        textDiv.appendChild(lineElement);
    });
    
    pageContent.appendChild(pageImage);
    pageContent.appendChild(textDiv);
    pageDiv.appendChild(pageContent);
    
    return pageDiv;
}

function setupEventListeners() {
    // Back button
    document.getElementById('backButton').addEventListener('click', () => {
        window.location.href = 'index.html';
    });
    
    // Previous page button
    document.getElementById('prevPage').addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (bookInstance) {
            bookInstance.turn('previous');
        }
    });
    
    // Next page button
    document.getElementById('nextPage').addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (bookInstance) {
            bookInstance.turn('next');
        }
    });
    
    // Keyboard navigation
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
            if (bookInstance) {
                bookInstance.turn('previous');
            }
        } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
            if (bookInstance) {
                bookInstance.turn('next');
            }
        }
    });
    
    // PDF export button
    document.getElementById('exportPdfButton').addEventListener('click', () => {
        exportToPDF();
    });
    
    // Update navigation buttons when page changes
    $('#book').bind('turning', function(event, page, view) {
        updateNavigationButtons();
    });
}

function updatePageIndicator(page) {
    document.getElementById('currentPage').textContent = page;
}

function updateNavigationButtons() {
    if (!bookInstance) return;
    
    const currentPage = bookInstance.turn('page');
    const totalPages = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    document.getElementById('prevPage').disabled = currentPage === 1;
    document.getElementById('nextPage').disabled = currentPage === totalPages;
}

function exportToPDF() {
    if (!currentBook) return;
    
    // Show loading state
    const exportButton = document.getElementById('exportPdfButton');
    const originalText = exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent;
    exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent = 'Generating PDF...';
    exportButton.disabled = true;
    
    // Create PDF with two-page spreads
    const { jsPDF } = window.jspdf;
    const pdf = new jsPDF({
        orientation: 'landscape',
        unit: 'mm',
        format: [297, 210] // A4 landscape (approximate board book size)
    });
    
    let pageIndex = 0;
    const totalPages = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    // Function to add pages to PDF
    function addPageToPDF(index) {
        if (index >= totalPages) {
            // All pages processed, save PDF
            pdf.save(`${currentBook.title.replace(/\s+/g, '-')}.pdf`);
            exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent = originalText;
            exportButton.disabled = false;
            return;
        }
        
        const page = currentBook.pages[index];
        const pageElement = document.querySelector(`#book .page:nth-child(${index + 1})`);
        
        if (!pageElement) {
            addPageToPDF(index + 1);
            return;
        }
        
        // Determine if this is a single page or part of a spread
        const isCover = page.type === 'cover' || page.type === 'back-cover';
        const isSpreadLeft = page.type === 'spread-left';
        const isSpreadRight = page.type === 'spread-right';
        
        if (isCover || (!isSpreadLeft && !isSpreadRight && index === totalPages - 1)) {
            // Single page (cover or back cover)
            html2canvas(pageElement, {
                backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                scale: 2,
                useCORS: true
            }).then(canvas => {
                const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                pdf.addPage();
                pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                addPageToPDF(index + 1);
            });
        } else if (isSpreadLeft) {
            // Two-page spread - combine left and right pages
            const rightPageIndex = index + 1;
            const rightPage = currentBook.pages[rightPageIndex];
            const rightPageElement = document.querySelector(`#book .page:nth-child(${rightPageIndex + 1})`);
            
            if (rightPageElement) {
                // Create a container for the spread
                const spreadContainer = document.createElement('div');
                spreadContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                spreadContainer.style.width = '1600px';
                spreadContainer.style.height = '600px';
                spreadContainer.style.position = 'absolute';
                spreadContainer.style.left = '-9999px';
                
                const leftClone = pageElement.cloneNode(true);
                const rightClone = rightPageElement.cloneNode(true);
                
                leftClone.style.width = '800px';
                leftClone.style.height = '600px';
                rightClone.style.width = '800px';
                rightClone.style.height = '600px';
                
                spreadContainer.appendChild(leftClone);
                spreadContainer.appendChild(rightClone);
                document.body.appendChild(spreadContainer);
                
                html2canvas(spreadContainer, {
                    backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                    scale: 2,
                    useCORS: true,
                    width: 1600,
                    height: 600
                }).then(canvas => {
                    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                    pdf.addPage();
                    pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                    document.body.removeChild(spreadContainer);
                    addPageToPDF(index + 2); // Skip right page as it's already included
                });
            } else {
                // Fallback to single page
                html2canvas(pageElement, {
                    backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                    scale: 2,
                    useCORS: true
                }).then(canvas => {
                    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                    pdf.addPage();
                    pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                    addPageToPDF(index + 1);
                });
            }
        } else if (isSpreadRight) {
            // Skip - already handled in spread-left
            addPageToPDF(index + 1);
        } else {
            // Single content page
            html2canvas(pageElement, {
                backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                scale: 2,
                useCORS: true
            }).then(canvas => {
                const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                pdf.addPage();
                pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                addPageToPDF(index + 1);
            });
        }
    }
    
    // Start processing
    addPageToPDF(0);
}
```

```javascript
// Book viewer functionality with Turn.js
let currentBook = null;
let bookInstance = null;
let currentPageIndex = 0; // 0-based index for tracking

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    // Get book ID from URL
    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const bookId = urlParams.get('book') || 'kais-first-birthday-book';
    
    // Find book in library
    currentBook = bookLibrary.find(b => b.id === bookId);
    
    if (!currentBook) {
        console.error('Book not found');
        return;
    }
    
    // Set book title
    document.getElementById('bookTitle').textContent = currentBook.title;
    document.getElementById('totalPages').textContent = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    // Set up event listeners first
    setupEventListeners();
    
    // Initialize book after a short delay to ensure DOM is ready
    setTimeout(() => {
        initializeBook();
    }, 100);
});

function initializeBook() {
    const bookElement = document.getElementById('book');
    bookElement.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Create pages based on book data
    currentBook.pages.forEach((page, index) => {
        const pageElement = createPageElement(page, index);
        bookElement.appendChild(pageElement);
    });
    
    // Initialize Turn.js with proper settings for square pages
    const pageSize = Math.min(window.innerWidth * 0.4, 500); // Square pages, max 500px
    
    bookInstance = $('#book').turn({
        width: pageSize * 2, // Double width for two-page spread
        height: pageSize,
        autoCenter: true,
        display: 'double', // Show two pages at once (except first and last)
        acceleration: true,
        gradients: true,
        elevation: 50,
        pages: currentBook.pages.length,
        when: {
            turning: function(event, page, view) {
                console.log('Turning to page:', page);
                currentPageIndex = page - 1;
                updatePageIndicator(page);
                updateNavigationButtons();
            },
            turned: function(event, page, view) {
                console.log('Turned to page:', page);
                currentPageIndex = page - 1;
                updatePageIndicator(page);
                updateNavigationButtons();
            }
        }
    });
    
    // Set initial page
    bookInstance.turn('page', 1);
    
    // Update page indicator for initial page
    updatePageIndicator(1);
    
    // Update navigation buttons
    updateNavigationButtons();
    
    console.log('Book initialized with', currentBook.pages.length, 'pages');
}

function createPageElement(page, index) {
    const pageDiv = document.createElement('div');
    pageDiv.className = 'page';
    pageDiv.setAttribute('data-page-number', page.pageNumber);
    
    // Determine corner rounding based on page position
    // First page (cover): round top-right and bottom-right
    // Last page (back cover): round top-left and bottom-left
    // Left pages (even): round top-left and bottom-left
    // Right pages (odd): round top-right and bottom-right
    if (index === 0) {
        // Front cover - right side rounded
        pageDiv.classList.add('page-cover-front');
    } else if (index === currentBook.pages.length - 1) {
        // Back cover - left side rounded
        pageDiv.classList.add('page-cover-back');
    } else if (page.pageNumber % 2 === 0) {
        // Even page number = left page
        pageDiv.classList.add('page-left');
    } else {
        // Odd page number = right page
        pageDiv.classList.add('page-right');
    }
    
    const pageContent = document.createElement('div');
    pageContent.className = 'page-content';
    pageContent.style.backgroundColor = page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff';
    
    // Add background image
    const pageImage = document.createElement('img');
    pageImage.className = 'page-image';
    pageImage.src = page.image;
    pageImage.alt = `Page ${page.pageNumber}`;
    pageImage.onerror = function() {
        // Fallback to just background color if image doesn't exist
        this.style.display = 'none';
    };
    
    // Add text overlay
    const textDiv = document.createElement('div');
    textDiv.className = `page-text ${page.text.color === 'white' ? 'white-text' : ''}`;
    
    page.text.lines.forEach(line => {
        const lineElement = document.createElement('p');
        lineElement.className = `${line.size}-text`;
        lineElement.style.fontWeight = line.weight || 'normal';
        if (line.weight === 'bold') {
            lineElement.style.textTransform = 'uppercase';
        }
        lineElement.textContent = line.text;
        textDiv.appendChild(lineElement);
    });
    
    pageContent.appendChild(pageImage);
    pageContent.appendChild(textDiv);
    pageDiv.appendChild(pageContent);
    
    return pageDiv;
}

function setupEventListeners() {
    // Back button
    document.getElementById('backButton').addEventListener('click', () => {
        window.location.href = 'index.html';
    });
    
    // Previous page button
    document.getElementById('prevPage').addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (bookInstance) {
            bookInstance.turn('previous');
        }
    });
    
    // Next page button
    document.getElementById('nextPage').addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (bookInstance) {
            bookInstance.turn('next');
        }
    });
    
    // Keyboard navigation
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
            if (bookInstance) {
                bookInstance.turn('previous');
            }
        } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
            if (bookInstance) {
                bookInstance.turn('next');
            }
        }
    });
    
    // PDF export button
    document.getElementById('exportPdfButton').addEventListener('click', () => {
        exportToPDF();
    });
    
    // Update navigation buttons when page changes
    $('#book').bind('turning', function(event, page, view) {
        updateNavigationButtons();
    });
}

function updatePageIndicator(page) {
    document.getElementById('currentPage').textContent = page;
}

function updateNavigationButtons() {
    if (!bookInstance) return;
    
    const currentPage = bookInstance.turn('page');
    const totalPages = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    document.getElementById('prevPage').disabled = currentPage === 1;
    document.getElementById('nextPage').disabled = currentPage === totalPages;
}

function exportToPDF() {
    if (!currentBook) return;
    
    // Show loading state
    const exportButton = document.getElementById('exportPdfButton');
    const originalText = exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent;
    exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent = 'Generating PDF...';
    exportButton.disabled = true;
    
    // Create PDF with two-page spreads
    const { jsPDF } = window.jspdf;
    const pdf = new jsPDF({
        orientation: 'landscape',
        unit: 'mm',
        format: [297, 210] // A4 landscape (approximate board book size)
    });
    
    let pageIndex = 0;
    const totalPages = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    // Function to add pages to PDF
    function addPageToPDF(index) {
        if (index >= totalPages) {
            // All pages processed, save PDF
            pdf.save(`${currentBook.title.replace(/\s+/g, '-')}.pdf`);
            exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent = originalText;
            exportButton.disabled = false;
            return;
        }
        
        const page = currentBook.pages[index];
        const pageElement = document.querySelector(`#book .page:nth-child(${index + 1})`);
        
        if (!pageElement) {
            addPageToPDF(index + 1);
            return;
        }
        
        // Determine if this is a single page or part of a spread
        const isCover = page.type === 'cover' || page.type === 'back-cover';
        const isSpreadLeft = page.type === 'spread-left';
        const isSpreadRight = page.type === 'spread-right';
        
        if (isCover || (!isSpreadLeft && !isSpreadRight && index === totalPages - 1)) {
            // Single page (cover or back cover)
            html2canvas(pageElement, {
                backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                scale: 2,
                useCORS: true
            }).then(canvas => {
                const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                pdf.addPage();
                pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                addPageToPDF(index + 1);
            });
        } else if (isSpreadLeft) {
            // Two-page spread - combine left and right pages
            const rightPageIndex = index + 1;
            const rightPage = currentBook.pages[rightPageIndex];
            const rightPageElement = document.querySelector(`#book .page:nth-child(${rightPageIndex + 1})`);
            
            if (rightPageElement) {
                // Create a container for the spread
                const spreadContainer = document.createElement('div');
                spreadContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                spreadContainer.style.width = '1600px';
                spreadContainer.style.height = '600px';
                spreadContainer.style.position = 'absolute';
                spreadContainer.style.left = '-9999px';
                
                const leftClone = pageElement.cloneNode(true);
                const rightClone = rightPageElement.cloneNode(true);
                
                leftClone.style.width = '800px';
                leftClone.style.height = '600px';
                rightClone.style.width = '800px';
                rightClone.style.height = '600px';
                
                spreadContainer.appendChild(leftClone);
                spreadContainer.appendChild(rightClone);
                document.body.appendChild(spreadContainer);
                
                html2canvas(spreadContainer, {
                    backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                    scale: 2,
                    useCORS: true,
                    width: 1600,
                    height: 600
                }).then(canvas => {
                    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                    pdf.addPage();
                    pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                    document.body.removeChild(spreadContainer);
                    addPageToPDF(index + 2); // Skip right page as it's already included
                });
            } else {
                // Fallback to single page
                html2canvas(pageElement, {
                    backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                    scale: 2,
                    useCORS: true
                }).then(canvas => {
                    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                    pdf.addPage();
                    pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                    addPageToPDF(index + 1);
                });
            }
        } else if (isSpreadRight) {
            // Skip - already handled in spread-left
            addPageToPDF(index + 1);
        } else {
            // Single content page
            html2canvas(pageElement, {
                backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                scale: 2,
                useCORS: true
            }).then(canvas => {
                const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                pdf.addPage();
                pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                addPageToPDF(index + 1);
            });
        }
    }
    
    // Start processing
    addPageToPDF(0);
}


```

```javascript
// Book viewer functionality with Turn.js
let currentBook = null;
let bookInstance = null;
let currentPageIndex = 0; // 0-based index for tracking

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    // Get book ID from URL
    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const bookId = urlParams.get('book') || 'kais-first-birthday-book';
    
    // Find book in library
    currentBook = bookLibrary.find(b => b.id === bookId);
    
    if (!currentBook) {
        console.error('Book not found');
        return;
    }
    
    // Set book title
    document.getElementById('bookTitle').textContent = currentBook.title;
    document.getElementById('totalPages').textContent = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    // Set up event listeners first
    setupEventListeners();
    
    // Initialize book after a short delay to ensure DOM is ready
    setTimeout(() => {
        initializeBook();
    }, 100);
});

function initializeBook() {
    const bookElement = document.getElementById('book');
    bookElement.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Create pages based on book data
    currentBook.pages.forEach((page, index) => {
        const pageElement = createPageElement(page, index);
        bookElement.appendChild(pageElement);
    });
    
    // Initialize Turn.js with proper settings for square pages
    const pageSize = Math.min(window.innerWidth * 0.4, 500); // Square pages, max 500px
    
    bookInstance = $('#book').turn({
        width: pageSize * 2, // Double width for two-page spread
        height: pageSize,
        autoCenter: true,
        display: 'double', // Show two pages at once (except first and last)
        acceleration: true,
        gradients: true,
        elevation: 50,
        pages: currentBook.pages.length,
        when: {
            turning: function(event, page, view) {
                console.log('Turning to page:', page);
                currentPageIndex = page - 1;
                updatePageIndicator(page);
                updateNavigationButtons();
            },
            turned: function(event, page, view) {
                console.log('Turned to page:', page);
                currentPageIndex = page - 1;
                updatePageIndicator(page);
                updateNavigationButtons();
            }
        }
    });
    
    // Set initial page
    bookInstance.turn('page', 1);
    
    // Update page indicator for initial page
    updatePageIndicator(1);
    
    // Update navigation buttons
    updateNavigationButtons();
    
    console.log('Book initialized with', currentBook.pages.length, 'pages');
}

function createPageElement(page, index) {
    const pageDiv = document.createElement('div');
    pageDiv.className = 'page';
    pageDiv.setAttribute('data-page-number', page.pageNumber);
    
    // Determine corner rounding based on page position
    // First page (cover): round top-right and bottom-right
    // Last page (back cover): round top-left and bottom-left
    // Left pages (even): round top-left and bottom-left
    // Right pages (odd): round top-right and bottom-right
    if (index === 0) {
        // Front cover - right side rounded
        pageDiv.classList.add('page-cover-front');
    } else if (index === currentBook.pages.length - 1) {
        // Back cover - left side rounded
        pageDiv.classList.add('page-cover-back');
    } else if (page.pageNumber % 2 === 0) {
        // Even page number = left page
        pageDiv.classList.add('page-left');
    } else {
        // Odd page number = right page
        pageDiv.classList.add('page-right');
    }
    
    const pageContent = document.createElement('div');
    pageContent.className = 'page-content';
    pageContent.style.backgroundColor = page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff';
    
    // Add background image
    const pageImage = document.createElement('img');
    pageImage.className = 'page-image';
    pageImage.src = page.image;
    pageImage.alt = `Page ${page.pageNumber}`;
    pageImage.onerror = function() {
        // Fallback to just background color if image doesn't exist
        this.style.display = 'none';
    };
    
    // Add text overlay
    const textDiv = document.createElement('div');
    textDiv.className = `page-text ${page.text.color === 'white' ? 'white-text' : ''}`;
    
    page.text.lines.forEach(line => {
        const lineElement = document.createElement('p');
        lineElement.className = `${line.size}-text`;
        lineElement.style.fontWeight = line.weight || 'normal';
        if (line.weight === 'bold') {
            lineElement.style.textTransform = 'uppercase';
        }
        lineElement.textContent = line.text;
        textDiv.appendChild(lineElement);
    });
    
    pageContent.appendChild(pageImage);
    pageContent.appendChild(textDiv);
    pageDiv.appendChild(pageContent);
    
    return pageDiv;
}

function setupEventListeners() {
    // Back button
    document.getElementById('backButton').addEventListener('click', () => {
        window.location.href = 'index.html';
    });
    
    // Previous page button
    document.getElementById('prevPage').addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (bookInstance) {
            bookInstance.turn('previous');
        }
    });
    
    // Next page button
    document.getElementById('nextPage').addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (bookInstance) {
            bookInstance.turn('next');
        }
    });
    
    // Keyboard navigation
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
            if (bookInstance) {
                bookInstance.turn('previous');
            }
        } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
            if (bookInstance) {
                bookInstance.turn('next');
            }
        }
    });
    
    // PDF export button
    document.getElementById('exportPdfButton').addEventListener('click', () => {
        exportToPDF();
    });
    
    // Update navigation buttons when page changes
    $('#book').bind('turning', function(event, page, view) {
        updateNavigationButtons();
    });
}

function updatePageIndicator(page) {
    document.getElementById('currentPage').textContent = page;
}

function updateNavigationButtons() {
    if (!bookInstance) return;
    
    const currentPage = bookInstance.turn('page');
    const totalPages = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    const prevBtn = document.getElementById('prevPage');
    const nextBtn = document.getElementById('nextPage');
    
    // Hide/show and enable/disable previous button
    if (currentPage === 1) {
        prevBtn.style.visibility = 'hidden'; // Hide on first page
        prevBtn.disabled = true;
    } else {
        prevBtn.style.visibility = 'visible';
        prevBtn.disabled = false;
    }
    
    // Hide/show and enable/disable next button
    if (currentPage === totalPages) {
        nextBtn.style.visibility = 'hidden'; // Hide on last page
        nextBtn.disabled = true;
    } else {
        nextBtn.style.visibility = 'visible';
        nextBtn.disabled = false;
    }
    
    console.log('Navigation updated - Page:', currentPage, 'Total:', totalPages);
}

function exportToPDF() {
    if (!currentBook) return;
    
    // Show loading state
    const exportButton = document.getElementById('exportPdfButton');
    const originalText = exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent;
    exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent = 'Generating PDF...';
    exportButton.disabled = true;
    
    // Create PDF with two-page spreads
    const { jsPDF } = window.jspdf;
    const pdf = new jsPDF({
        orientation: 'landscape',
        unit: 'mm',
        format: [297, 210] // A4 landscape (approximate board book size)
    });
    
    let pageIndex = 0;
    const totalPages = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    // Function to add pages to PDF
    function addPageToPDF(index) {
        if (index >= totalPages) {
            // All pages processed, save PDF
            pdf.save(`${currentBook.title.replace(/\s+/g, '-')}.pdf`);
            exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent = originalText;
            exportButton.disabled = false;
            return;
        }
        
        const page = currentBook.pages[index];
        const pageElement = document.querySelector(`#book .page:nth-child(${index + 1})`);
        
        if (!pageElement) {
            addPageToPDF(index + 1);
            return;
        }
        
        // Determine if this is a single page or part of a spread
        const isCover = page.type === 'cover' || page.type === 'back-cover';
        const isSpreadLeft = page.type === 'spread-left';
        const isSpreadRight = page.type === 'spread-right';
        
        if (isCover || (!isSpreadLeft && !isSpreadRight && index === totalPages - 1)) {
            // Single page (cover or back cover)
            html2canvas(pageElement, {
                backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                scale: 2,
                useCORS: true
            }).then(canvas => {
                const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                pdf.addPage();
                pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                addPageToPDF(index + 1);
            });
        } else if (isSpreadLeft) {
            // Two-page spread - combine left and right pages
            const rightPageIndex = index + 1;
            const rightPage = currentBook.pages[rightPageIndex];
            const rightPageElement = document.querySelector(`#book .page:nth-child(${rightPageIndex + 1})`);
            
            if (rightPageElement) {
                // Create a container for the spread
                const spreadContainer = document.createElement('div');
                spreadContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                spreadContainer.style.width = '1600px';
                spreadContainer.style.height = '600px';
                spreadContainer.style.position = 'absolute';
                spreadContainer.style.left = '-9999px';
                
                const leftClone = pageElement.cloneNode(true);
                const rightClone = rightPageElement.cloneNode(true);
                
                leftClone.style.width = '800px';
                leftClone.style.height = '600px';
                rightClone.style.width = '800px';
                rightClone.style.height = '600px';
                
                spreadContainer.appendChild(leftClone);
                spreadContainer.appendChild(rightClone);
                document.body.appendChild(spreadContainer);
                
                html2canvas(spreadContainer, {
                    backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                    scale: 2,
                    useCORS: true,
                    width: 1600,
                    height: 600
                }).then(canvas => {
                    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                    pdf.addPage();
                    pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                    document.body.removeChild(spreadContainer);
                    addPageToPDF(index + 2); // Skip right page as it's already included
                });
            } else {
                // Fallback to single page
                html2canvas(pageElement, {
                    backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                    scale: 2,
                    useCORS: true
                }).then(canvas => {
                    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                    pdf.addPage();
                    pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                    addPageToPDF(index + 1);
                });
            }
        } else if (isSpreadRight) {
            // Skip - already handled in spread-left
            addPageToPDF(index + 1);
        } else {
            // Single content page
            html2canvas(pageElement, {
                backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                scale: 2,
                useCORS: true
            }).then(canvas => {
                const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                pdf.addPage();
                pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 297, 210);
                addPageToPDF(index + 1);
            });
        }
    }
    
    // Start processing
    addPageToPDF(0);
}


```

```javascript
// Book viewer functionality with Turn.js
let currentBook = null;
let bookInstance = null;
let currentPageIndex = 0; // 0-based index for tracking

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    // Get book ID from URL
    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const bookId = urlParams.get('book') || 'kais-first-birthday-book';
    
    // Find book in library
    currentBook = bookLibrary.find(b => b.id === bookId);
    
    if (!currentBook) {
        console.error('Book not found');
        return;
    }
    
    // Set book title
    document.getElementById('bookTitle').textContent = currentBook.title;
    document.getElementById('totalPages').textContent = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    // Set up event listeners first
    setupEventListeners();
    
    // Initialize book after a short delay to ensure DOM is ready
    setTimeout(() => {
        initializeBook();
    }, 100);
});

function initializeBook() {
    const bookElement = document.getElementById('book');
    bookElement.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Create pages based on book data
    currentBook.pages.forEach((page, index) => {
        const pageElement = createPageElement(page, index);
        bookElement.appendChild(pageElement);
    });
    
    // Initialize Turn.js with proper settings for square pages
    const pageSize = Math.min(window.innerWidth * 0.4, 500); // Square pages, max 500px
    
    bookInstance = $('#book').turn({
        width: pageSize * 2, // Double width for two-page spread
        height: pageSize,
        autoCenter: true,
        display: 'double', // Show two pages at once (except first and last)
        acceleration: true,
        gradients: true,
        elevation: 50,
        pages: currentBook.pages.length,
        when: {
            turning: function(event, page, view) {
                console.log('Turning to page:', page);
                currentPageIndex = page - 1;
                updatePageIndicator(page);
                updateNavigationButtons();
            },
            turned: function(event, page, view) {
                console.log('Turned to page:', page);
                currentPageIndex = page - 1;
                updatePageIndicator(page);
                updateNavigationButtons();
            }
        }
    });
    
    // Set initial page
    bookInstance.turn('page', 1);
    
    // Update page indicator for initial page
    updatePageIndicator(1);
    
    // Update navigation buttons
    updateNavigationButtons();
    
    console.log('Book initialized with', currentBook.pages.length, 'pages');
}

function createPageElement(page, index) {
    const pageDiv = document.createElement('div');
    pageDiv.className = 'page';
    pageDiv.setAttribute('data-page-number', page.pageNumber);
    
    // Determine corner rounding based on page position
    // First page (cover): round top-right and bottom-right
    // Last page (back cover): round top-left and bottom-left
    // Left pages (even): round top-left and bottom-left
    // Right pages (odd): round top-right and bottom-right
    if (index === 0) {
        // Front cover - right side rounded
        pageDiv.classList.add('page-cover-front');
    } else if (index === currentBook.pages.length - 1) {
        // Back cover - left side rounded
        pageDiv.classList.add('page-cover-back');
    } else if (page.pageNumber % 2 === 0) {
        // Even page number = left page
        pageDiv.classList.add('page-left');
    } else {
        // Odd page number = right page
        pageDiv.classList.add('page-right');
    }
    
    const pageContent = document.createElement('div');
    pageContent.className = 'page-content';
    pageContent.style.backgroundColor = page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff';
    
    // Add background image
    const pageImage = document.createElement('img');
    pageImage.className = 'page-image';
    pageImage.src = page.image;
    pageImage.alt = `Page ${page.pageNumber}`;
    pageImage.onerror = function() {
        // Fallback to just background color if image doesn't exist
        this.style.display = 'none';
    };
    
    // Add text overlay
    const textDiv = document.createElement('div');
    textDiv.className = `page-text ${page.text.color === 'white' ? 'white-text' : ''}`;
    
    page.text.lines.forEach(line => {
        const lineElement = document.createElement('p');
        lineElement.className = `${line.size}-text`;
        lineElement.style.fontWeight = line.weight || 'normal';
        if (line.weight === 'bold') {
            lineElement.style.textTransform = 'uppercase';
        }
        lineElement.textContent = line.text;
        textDiv.appendChild(lineElement);
    });
    
    pageContent.appendChild(pageImage);
    pageContent.appendChild(textDiv);
    pageDiv.appendChild(pageContent);
    
    return pageDiv;
}

function setupEventListeners() {
    // Back button
    document.getElementById('backButton').addEventListener('click', () => {
        window.location.href = 'index.html';
    });
    
    // Previous page button
    document.getElementById('prevPage').addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (bookInstance) {
            bookInstance.turn('previous');
        }
    });
    
    // Next page button
    document.getElementById('nextPage').addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (bookInstance) {
            bookInstance.turn('next');
        }
    });
    
    // Keyboard navigation
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
            if (bookInstance) {
                bookInstance.turn('previous');
            }
        } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
            if (bookInstance) {
                bookInstance.turn('next');
            }
        }
    });
    
    // PDF export button
    document.getElementById('exportPdfButton').addEventListener('click', () => {
        exportToPDF();
    });
    
    // Update navigation buttons when page changes
    $('#book').bind('turning', function(event, page, view) {
        updateNavigationButtons();
    });
}

function updatePageIndicator(page) {
    document.getElementById('currentPage').textContent = page;
}

function updateNavigationButtons() {
    if (!bookInstance) return;
    
    const currentPage = bookInstance.turn('page');
    const totalPages = currentBook.pages.length;
    
    const prevBtn = document.getElementById('prevPage');
    const nextBtn = document.getElementById('nextPage');
    
    // Hide/show and enable/disable previous button
    if (currentPage === 1) {
        prevBtn.style.visibility = 'hidden'; // Hide on first page
        prevBtn.disabled = true;
    } else {
        prevBtn.style.visibility = 'visible';
        prevBtn.disabled = false;
    }
    
    // Hide/show and enable/disable next button
    if (currentPage === totalPages) {
        nextBtn.style.visibility = 'hidden'; // Hide on last page
        nextBtn.disabled = true;
    } else {
        nextBtn.style.visibility = 'visible';
        nextBtn.disabled = false;
    }
    
    console.log('Navigation updated - Page:', currentPage, 'Total:', totalPages);
}

async function exportToPDF() {
    if (!currentBook) return;
    
    // Show loading state
    const exportButton = document.getElementById('exportPdfButton');
    const originalText = exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent;
    exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent = 'Generating PDF...';
    exportButton.disabled = true;
    
    try {
        // Create PDF with square format for each page (or two-page spread)
        const { jsPDF } = window.jspdf;
        
        // First page (cover) - single page
        let pdf = new jsPDF({
            orientation: 'portrait',
            unit: 'px',
            format: [500, 500] // Square format
        });
        
        let isFirstPage = true;
        
        // Process each page
        for (let i = 0; i < currentBook.pages.length; i++) {
            const page = currentBook.pages[i];
            const pageElement = document.querySelector(`.page[data-page-number="${page.pageNumber}"]`);
            
            if (!pageElement) continue;
            
            // Determine if this is a cover page
            const isFrontCover = i === 0;
            const isBackCover = i === currentBook.pages.length - 1;
            
            if (isFrontCover || isBackCover) {
                // Single page for covers
                if (!isFirstPage) {
                    pdf.addPage([500, 500], 'portrait');
                }
                
                const canvas = await html2canvas(pageElement, {
                    backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                    scale: 2,
                    useCORS: true,
                    width: 500,
                    height: 500
                });
                
                const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 500, 500);
                isFirstPage = false;
            } else {
                // Two-page spread for content pages
                const nextPage = currentBook.pages[i + 1];
                
                if (nextPage && !isBackCover) {
                    // Create two-page spread
                    if (!isFirstPage) {
                        pdf.addPage([1000, 500], 'landscape');
                    } else {
                        // Replace first page with landscape
                        pdf = new jsPDF({
                            orientation: 'landscape',
                            unit: 'px',
                            format: [1000, 500]
                        });
                    }
                    
                    const leftPageElement = pageElement;
                    const rightPageElement = document.querySelector(`.page[data-page-number="${nextPage.pageNumber}"]`);
                    
                    // Create spread container
                    const spreadContainer = document.createElement('div');
                    spreadContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                    spreadContainer.style.width = '1000px';
                    spreadContainer.style.height = '500px';
                    spreadContainer.style.position = 'absolute';
                    spreadContainer.style.left = '-10000px';
                    spreadContainer.style.top = '0';
                    
                    const leftClone = leftPageElement.cloneNode(true);
                    const rightClone = rightPageElement.cloneNode(true);
                    
                    leftClone.style.width = '500px';
                    leftClone.style.height = '500px';
                    leftClone.style.display = 'block';
                    rightClone.style.width = '500px';
                    rightClone.style.height = '500px';
                    rightClone.style.display = 'block';
                    
                    spreadContainer.appendChild(leftClone);
                    spreadContainer.appendChild(rightClone);
                    document.body.appendChild(spreadContainer);
                    
                    const canvas = await html2canvas(spreadContainer, {
                        backgroundColor: page.backgroundColor || '#ffffff',
                        scale: 2,
                        useCORS: true,
                        width: 1000,
                        height: 500
                    });
                    
                    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
                    pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, 1000, 500);
                    
                    document.body.removeChild(spreadContainer);
                    isFirstPage = false;
                    i++; // Skip next page as we've already included it
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Save PDF
        pdf.save(`${currentBook.title.replace(/\s+/g, '-')}.pdf`);
        
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error generating PDF:', error);
        alert('Error generating PDF. Please try again.');
    } finally {
        // Reset button state
        exportButton.querySelector('.mdc-button__label').textContent = originalText;
        exportButton.disabled = false;
    }
}


```

Now let's update the CSS to make pages square with proper rounded corners:

```css
.book-viewer-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    background-color: #f5f5f5;
}

.book-viewer-header {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    z-index: 10;
}

.book-viewer-main {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 80px 16px 32px;
    min-height: 100vh;
}

.book-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 16px;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
}

.book-controls {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.page-turn-btn {
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
    color: var(--mdc-theme-primary);
    box-shadow: var(--mdc-elevation-shadow-2);
}

.page-turn-btn:hover {
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 1);
    box-shadow: var(--mdc-elevation-shadow-4);
}

.page-turn-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.5;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* Turn.js Book Styles */
.book {
    width: 1000px; /* Double the page size for spread view */
    height: 500px; /* Square pages (500x500 each) */
    max-width: 90vw;
    margin: 0 auto;
    box-shadow: var(--mdc-elevation-shadow-8);
    position: relative;
}

.book .page {
    width: 500px; /* Square pages */
    height: 500px;
    background-color: white;
    background-size: cover;
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-position: center;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* Rounded corners for different page positions */
.book .page-cover-front {
    /* Front cover - round right side */
    border-top-right-radius: 20px;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 20px;
}

.book .page-cover-back {
    /* Back cover - round left side */
    border-top-left-radius: 20px;
    border-bottom-left-radius: 20px;
}

.book .page-left {
    /* Left pages in spread - round left side */
    border-top-left-radius: 20px;
    border-bottom-left-radius: 20px;
}

.book .page-right {
    /* Right pages in spread - round right side */
    border-top-right-radius: 20px;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 20px;
}

.book .page-content {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 32px;
}

.book .page-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    z-index: 0;
}

.book .page-text {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
    color: #000;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 24px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    min-height: 100%;
}

.book .page-text.white-text {
    color: #fff;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

.book .page-text h1 {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.book .page-text h2 {
    font-size: 2rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.book .page-text p {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.book .page-text .large-text {
    font-size: 3rem;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.book .page-text .medium-text {
    font-size: 2rem;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.book .page-text .small-text {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.book .page-text .emphasis {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* Page Indicator */
.page-indicator {
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
    margin-top: 16px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Responsive Design for Book Viewer */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .book-wrapper {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 8px;
    }
    
    .book-controls {
        order: 2;
    }
    
    .book-controls-left {
        order: 1;
    }
    
    .book-controls-right {
        order: 3;
    }
    
    .book {
        width: 100vw;
        height: 70vh;
        max-height: 500px;
    }
    
    .book .page-text h1 {
        font-size: 1.75rem;
    }
    
    .book .page-text h2 {
        font-size: 1.5rem;
    }
    
    .book .page-text p {
        font-size: 1.25rem;
    }
    
    .book .page-text .large-text {
        font-size: 2rem;
    }
    
    .book .page-text .medium-text {
        font-size: 1.5rem;
    }
    
    .book .page-text .small-text {
        font-size: 1rem;
    }
    
    .book .page-text .emphasis {
        font-size: 1.75rem;
    }
    
    .book .page-content {
        padding: 16px;
    }
}

@media (max-width: 480px) {
    .book {
        height: 60vh;
        max-height: 400px;
    }
    
    .book .page-text {
        padding: 16px;
    }
    
    .book .page-text h1 {
        font-size: 1.5rem;
    }
    
    .book .page-text p {
        font-size: 1rem;
    }
}
```

```css
.book-viewer-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    background-color: #f5f5f5;
}

.book-viewer-header {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    z-index: 10;
}

.book-viewer-main {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 80px 16px 32px;
    min-height: 100vh;
}

.book-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 16px;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
}

.book-controls {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.page-turn-btn {
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
    color: var(--mdc-theme-primary);
    box-shadow: var(--mdc-elevation-shadow-2);
}

.page-turn-btn:hover {
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 1);
    box-shadow: var(--mdc-elevation-shadow-4);
}

.page-turn-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.5;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

/* Turn.js Book Styles */
.book {
    width: 1000px; /* Double the page size for spread view */
    height: 500px; /* Square pages (500x500 each) */
    max-width: 90vw;
    margin: 0 auto;
    box-shadow: var(--mdc-elevation-shadow-8);
    position: relative;
}

.book .page {
    width: 500px; /* Square pages */
    height: 500px;
    background-color: white;
    background-size: cover;
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-position: center;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* Rounded corners for different page positions */
.book .page-cover-front {
    /* Front cover - round right side */
    border-top-right-radius: 20px;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 20px;
}

.book .page-cover-back {
    /* Back cover - round left side */
    border-top-left-radius: 20px;
    border-bottom-left-radius: 20px;
}

.book .page-left {
    /* Left pages in spread - round left side */
    border-top-left-radius: 20px;
    border-bottom-left-radius: 20px;
}

.book .page-right {
    /* Right pages in spread - round right side */
    border-top-right-radius: 20px;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 20px;
}

.book .page-content {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 32px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.book .page-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain; /* Changed from cover to contain to preserve square aspect ratio */
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.book .page-text {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
    color: #000;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 24px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    min-height: 100%;
}

.book .page-text.white-text {
    color: #fff;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

.book .page-text h1 {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.book .page-text h2 {
    font-size: 2rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.book .page-text p {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.book .page-text .large-text {
    font-size: 3rem;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.book .page-text .medium-text {
    font-size: 2rem;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.book .page-text .small-text {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.book .page-text .emphasis {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* Page Indicator */
.page-indicator {
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
    margin-top: 16px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Responsive Design for Book Viewer */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .book-wrapper {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 8px;
    }
    
    .book-controls {
        order: 2;
    }
```

```css
    font-weight: 500;
}

    .book {
        width: 800px;

    }
    
    .book-controls {
        order: 2;
    }
    
    .book-controls-left {
        order: 1;
    }
    
    .book-controls-right {
        order: 3;
    }
    
    .book {
        width: 600px;
        height: 300px;
        max-width: 95vw;
    }
    
    .book .page {
        width: 300px;
        height: 300px;
    }
    
    .book .page-text h1 {
        font-size: 1.75rem;
    }

    }

    }

    }

        font-size: 1rem;
    }

        font-size: 1.75rem;
    }
    
    .book .page-content {
        padding: 16px;
    }
}

@media (max-width: 480px) {

    }

        padding: 16px;
    }

        font-size: 1rem;
    }
}
```

```css
}
```
